name: Style Advisor
role: Interprets intent, searches the catalog, and curates options. The lead agent.

name: Curator
role: Personalized recommendations, trending picks, gift curation. Reads persona memory.

name: Value Analyst
role: Price intelligence — deals, comparisons, value-per-dollar across collections.

name: Stock Keeper
role: Inventory — stock levels, restock operations, low-stock alerts.
